MOV.description: Copies data from source operand to destination operand

ADD.description: Adds source operand to destination operand

SUB.description: Subtracts source operand from destination operand

MUL.description: Unsigned multiply. Multiplies the source operand by the accumulator (AL or AX) and stores the result in AX or DX:AX.

DIV.description: Unsigned divide. Divides AX or DX:AX by the source operand; quotient stored in AL or AX, remainder in AH or DX.

AND.description: Performs bitwise AND between source and destination operands.

OR.description: Performs bitwise OR between source and destination operands.

XOR.description: Performs bitwise XOR between source and destination operands.

NOT.description: Performs bitwise NOT (inverts all bits) of the operand.

SHL.description: Shifts bits of the operand left by a specified count; zero bits are shifted in.

SHR.description: Shifts bits of the operand right by a specified count; zero bits are shifted in.

JMP.description: Unconditional jump to the specified address.

CMP.description: Compares two operands by subtracting source from destination without storing the result; sets flags accordingly.

XCHG.description: Exchanges the contents of the source operand with the destination operand
